sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37446" key="e(ckaipenthkontapla/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξκαιπεντηκονταπλάσιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[πλᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n37446.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fifty-six fold,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.925c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
